title: atragene alpina var. ochotensis
intro: Atragene alpina var. ochotensis, also known as Gentianella alpina var. ochotensis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Russia and Eastern Europe, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Gentianella alpina var. ochotensis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
